titleStmt.title: SII 22.201: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 201. (A.R. No. 201 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, PĒRAṄGIYŪR. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. PAR. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—30th YEAR (A.D. 1042-43).

summary.p: This records a gift of 90 sheep for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mūlasthānam-uḍaiya-Mahādēva at Pēriṅgūr a brahmadēya of Tirumuṉaippāḍi, a division of Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by Pūdi Gaṇapperumāṉ and his son Gaṇapperumāṉ Dēvargaṇḍaṉ, both resident at the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakesaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājentracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu rāje
ntra(ra)coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭi brahmadeyam periṅkūr śrī mulasthāṉa muṭaiya mahādevaṟ
ku Ivvūr vaṭakarai Uṭaiyāṉ(m) pūtikaṇapperumāṉ vaiytta tiru nuntāviḷakkaraiyum Ivaṉ makaṉ
kaṇapperumāṉ tevarkaṇṭaṉ vaitta tirunantāviḷakkaraiyum Ākat tirunantāviḷakkoṉṟukkum Āṭu to
ṇṇūṟum Ittirununtāviḷakkerivatāka viḷakku kāṟ cāṇ niḷat teriya vaitta viḷakkum vaittoṉ ka
ṇapperumāṉ tevarkaṇṭaṉ vaittāṉ cantirātittavaṟ Ittirunantā viḷakku Aviyāme
y kāppāṉ śrī pātam Eṉ talaimelatu .
Digital edition of SII 22.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
